auth.magicLinkDescription: We'll send you a magic link to sign in without a password
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.clientHint: Are you a client? Check your email for a review link.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.registrationError: Could not create account. Please try again.
auth.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your design review activity
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Here's an overview of your firm's design pipeline
dashboard.noActivityHint: Activity will show up here as your team uploads files, reviews designs, and updates projects.
dashboard.noDeadlinesHint: Projects with deadlines set will appear here as they approach.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Create your first project to start tracking designs, reviews, and team progress.

projects.title: All Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage and track all design review projects

projectDetail.title: Project Detail
projectDetail.emptyDesignSections: No design sections yet. Upload your first design to get started.
projectDetail.yourDecisionHint: Review all documents, then approve or request changes.
projectDetail.projectApprovedHint: This project has been approved by the client.
projectDetail.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Be the first to leave feedback.
projectDetail.noFilesDescription: No documents have been uploaded for this phase yet.
projectDetail.requestChangesHint: Describe what changes you'd like the architect to make.
projectDetail.requestChangesPlaceholder: Please describe the changes you need...

designReview.title: Design Review
designReview.approvedDescription: Great! The design has been approved.
designReview.rejectedDescription: The design has been rejected and the team will be notified.
designReview.changesRequestedDescription: The design team has been notified of your feedback.
designReview.commentPostedDescription: Your feedback has been added to the review.
designReview.changesRequestedTooltip: Request revisions from the design team

designUpload.title: Upload Design
designUpload.dropzone: Drop files here or click to upload
designUpload.dropzoneHint: Supports PDF, DWG, and image files up to 50MB
designUpload.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this design revision...

clientReview.title: Client Review
clientReview.commentPlaceholder: Share your feedback with the design team...
clientReview.changesRequestedDescription: Your feedback has been sent to the design team.

createProject.title: Create New Project
createProject.noArchitects: No architects in your organisation yet. Invite members first.
createProject.clientEmailHint: The client will receive a review link when designs are approved.
createProject.createdDescription: Your new project has been created successfully.

editProject.title: Edit Project
editProject.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All design files, reviews, and comments associated with this project will be permanently removed.

team.title: Team Management
team.subtitle: Manage your team members and roles

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated with your project activity
notifications.allCaughtUpDescription: All notifications have been marked as read.
notifications.invitationReceived: You've been invited to an organisation
notifications.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all notifications?

settings.title: User Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.invalidFileTypeDesc: Please use JPG, PNG, or WebP.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email updates for reviews, approvals, and deadlines
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Get browser push notifications for real-time updates
settings.darkModeDesc: Use dark color scheme across the application
settings.savedDescription: Your profile has been updated successfully.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your account, projects, and all data. Type DELETE and enter your password to confirm.
settings.deleteError: Could not delete account. Check your password and try again.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Update your account password. You'll need your current password to make changes.
settings.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.passwordChangeError: Could not update password. Check your current password and try again.
settings.saveProfileError: Could not save profile. Please try again.

audit.title: Audit History
audit.subtitle: Track all actions and changes across projects

emptyStates.projectsDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or create a new project to get started.
emptyStates.designSectionsDescription: Upload your first design to get started with reviews.
emptyStates.notificationsDescription: You have no notifications right now. We'll let you know when something needs your attention.
emptyStates.auditDescription: Try a different search term to find the activity you're looking for.
emptyStates.teamDescription: Invite your first team member to start collaborating on projects.
emptyStates.clientProjectsDescription: You'll see your projects here once your architect shares them with you.
emptyStates.commentsDescription: Be the first to leave feedback on this design.

onboarding.title: Set up your organisation
onboarding.subtitle: Create your firm's workspace to start managing projects and team members.
onboarding.createError: Failed to create organisation. Please try again.
onboarding.createdDescription: Your organisation has been set up successfully.

organisation.title: Organisation
organisation.noOrgSubtitle: You haven't created an organisation yet.
organisation.createSubtitle: Set up your firm's workspace to manage projects and team members.
organisation.createError: Failed to create organisation. Please try again.
organisation.alreadyExists: An organisation with this slug already exists. Try a different name.

organisation.inviteDescription: Send an email invitation to join your organisation.

organisation.inviteError: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
organisation.memberRemovedDescription: The member has been removed from the organisation.
